name: Honey Bun Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a mixing bowl; beat at medium speed with an electric mixer until smooth. Set aside.
2. Mix brown sugar, cinnamon, and pecans separately.
3. Pour half of the batter into a greased and floured 13x9x2 baking pan. Sprinkle half of the sugar mixture over the batter.
4. Repeat steps 3 and 4 with the remaining batter and sugar mixture.
5. Gently swirl the batter with a knife to combine.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and drizzle glaze over the cake.
8. Allow the cake to cool before cutting into squares.
Yield: 15 to 18 servings.
